name: Securize IT Solutions AG
summary: Securize IT Solutions AG provides big data applications technology and services in Germany. It offers DIMENSIO power application, which is used for the analysis and optimization of database processes. The company also provides planning, integration, and support services, as well as operates and supervises IT infrastructures, database systems, and cloud solutions for banking, insurance, and public administration; and designs range of IT systems for company-specific applications. In addition, it distributes Oracle products. The company was formerly known as micData AG and changed its name to Securize IT Solutions AG in November 2019. Securize IT Solutions AG was founded in 2009 and is based in Munich, Germany.
